prompt: Create a photorealistic professional CHARACTER REFERENCE SHEET as a single high-resolution image, arranged as a clean 4x2 grid (4 columns, 2 rows, 8 equal cells; the 8th/last cell is empty plain background). The provided reference image is the EXACT person Melissa — preserve her identity, facial structure, skin tone, freckles, hair colour and style, eye colour and proportions with high fidelity in EVERY panel. It must be unmistakably the SAME person in all panels, zero drift. Melissa: dark near-black long wavy hair with a centre part, warm brown eyes, deeper warm tan skin, strong defined dark brows, subtle light freckles. Wardrobe in every panel: a cream off-white ribbed scoop-neck sleeveless tank top. Neutral expression in every panel, mouth closed, no smile. The 8 cells left-to-right, top row then bottom row: 1) Frontal — facing camera directly, shoulders square. 2) Three-quarter left — head turned about 30 degrees to her left. 3) Three-quarter right — head turned about 30 degrees to her right. 4) Left profile — full 90-degree side view (left), eye-level. 5) Right profile — full 90-degree side view (right), eye-level. 6) Slight downward tilt — head tilted down about 15 degrees, eyes toward camera. 7) Slight upward tilt — head tilted up about 15 degrees. 8) empty cell. Every panel: chest-up portrait, identical camera lens and framing, centered subject, identical even three-point studio lighting with soft shadows and no harsh contrast, seamless neutral light-grey background (#d8d8d8). Label each panel with its angle name in a small minimal sans-serif font. Ultra-sharp, studio quality, purely photorealistic, no stylisation.
